title: Update .rules to reflect current transaction-aware workflow
summary: Revise .rules to align with current MCP server behavior and transaction-aware task management guidance.
acceptance_criteria: .rules reflects the current transaction-aware workflow steps and logging/persistence expectations.
Outdated or conflicting instructions are removed or corrected.
.rules guidance is consistent with MCP server behavior described in src/.

steps.description: Review current .rules content and mark sections that diverge from MCP server behavior.
Update transaction-aware workflow instructions, ordering, and persistence/logging guidance.
Validate .rules consistency with current src/ implementation and plan requirements.

notes: Updated Start section to explicitly treat `.agent/handoff.json` as derived-only.
Replaced `${VERIFY_REL}` with `repo_verify` wording to match tool registry.
Expanded tooling list to match current server tools (commit_if_verified, repo_* helpers, session_capture_context, tests_suggest*, ops_* task/state tools).
Clarified ops_handoff_export to remove optional path wording.
